metadata.description: Short project identifier used in all resource names (e.g. "myproj"). Alphanumeric and hyphens only. Max 8 chars to fit Azure Storage 24-char limit.
Name of the environment (e.g., dev, staging, prod). Use "prod" for production.
Primary Azure region for all resources
Tags to apply to all resources
Azure AI Search SKU
Principal ID of the deployer (human user). AZD populates this via AZURE_PRINCIPAL_ID.
Entra App Registration client ID for web app Easy Auth
Entra App Registration client secret for web app Easy Auth
Azure region for resources
Base name used for resource naming
Tags to apply to all resources
Principal ID of the deployer (human user) for Log Analytics Reader role on App Insights
Principal ID of the AI Services managed identity — needs Log Analytics Reader so Foundry can query traces
Azure region for resources
Globally unique storage account name (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric)
Tags to apply to all resources
Container names to create in this account
Principal ID to grant Storage Blob Data Contributor role (service principal / managed identity)
Principal ID of the deployer (human user) for blob access
Principal ID to grant Storage Blob Data Reader role (e.g., Container App MI for read-only access)

projectEndpoint.value: [reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects', format('ai-{0}', parameters('baseName')), format('proj-{0}', parameters('baseName'))), '2025-06-01').endpoints['AI Foundry API']]
